name: fluxaurabutton
title: Flux Aura Button
description: A "God-Tier" Glow Button inspired by CSS Hover effects. Features: - Magnetic Aura: A liquid neon glow that tracks mouse movement. - Prism Text: Subtle RGB shift on hover. - Crystalline Glass: High-end glassmorphic surface. - Spatial Audio: Tactile feedback on hover and click.
